chunks.title: Restrictions on Assembly Entry
chunks.reason: A cohesive set of laws defining who may enter the assembly based on physical condition, lineage, and nationality.

chunks.title: Camp Purity Regulations
chunks.reason: Instructions regarding ritual cleanliness for soldiers during military campaigns.

chunks.title: Social and Economic Laws
chunks.reason: A collection of statutes covering escaped slaves, cultic prostitution, interest rates, vows, and field rights.
